## Bug Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **App**: Desktop / Android
- **Version**: e.g. 1.2.1
- **OS**: e.g. Windows 10, Android 14
- **Model/Provider**: e.g. GLM-5.1 / Anthropic

## Additional Context

Logs, screenshots, or any other relevant information.
